Pro League is a significant Skyesports event that spans multiple game titles including as Dota 2, League Of Legends and BGMI, with a total prize pool of 15,00,000.00{{Abbr/INR}}. ===Broadcast Raghuwanshi|b2flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/end}} ===Format=== '''''Skyesports Pro League''' 9th March 2022 to 18th March 2022''. * '''''Semi-Finals''' 9th March 2022 to 12th March 2022'' ** '' A total of 24 invited teams will play in the Semi Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Teams will compete in a round robin format ** '' 20 Matches to be played over a period of 4 days, ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 16 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Finals.'' * '''''Finals:''' 13st March 2022 to 18th March 2022'' ** '' A total of 16 Qualified teams will play in the Grand Finals'' ** ''25 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days . ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For {{abbr|"Points Matrix"|Points Matrix}} '''Click here'''.}}}
